---
title: "Cabezon sdmTMB"
author: "Dan Portnof"
date: "2026-02-25"
output: word_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r STAR report}
library(tidyverse)
library(r4ss)
library(here)

wd <- "Cab_SCS_BC_STAR"

pp             <- SS_output(wd)
derived_quants <- pp[["derived_quants"]]
params         <- pp[["parameters"]]

# ── Recruitment deviations (1970–2018) ────────────────────────────────────────

devyrs   <- 1970:2018
devdf    <- pp$parameters[28:76, ]
devvalue <- devdf[, 3]
devsd    <- devdf[, 11]

y <- data.frame(
  year  = devyrs,
  value = devvalue,
  lo    = devvalue - 1.96 * devsd,
  hi    = devvalue + 1.96 * devsd
)

STAR_recdevs <- ggplot(y, aes(x = year, ymin = lo, ymax = hi)) +
  geom_ribbon(fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = value)) +
  labs(title = "Cabezon SoCal Recruitment Deviations") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_recdevs

# ── Age-0 recruits (1970–2018) ────────────────────────────────────────────────

age0yrs <- 1970:2018
age0    <- derived_quants[174:222, "Value"]
age0sd  <- derived_quants[174:222, "StdDev"]

x <- data.frame(
  year  = age0yrs,
  value = age0,
  lo    = age0 - 1.96 * age0sd,
  hi    = age0 + 1.96 * age0sd
)

STAR_age0 <- ggplot(x, aes(x = year, ymin = lo, ymax = hi)) +
  geom_ribbon(fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = value)) +
  labs(title = "Cabezon SoCal Age-0 Recruits") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_age0

# ── Spawning stock biomass (1916–2018) ────────────────────────────────────────

ssbyrs <- 1916:2018
ssb    <- derived_quants[3:105, "Value"]
ssbsd  <- derived_quants[3:105, "StdDev"]

z <- data.frame(
  year  = ssbyrs,
  value = ssb,
  lo    = ssb - 1.96 * ssbsd,
  hi    = ssb + 1.96 * ssbsd
)

STAR_SSB <- ggplot(z, aes(x = year, ymin = lo, ymax = hi)) +
  geom_ribbon(fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = value)) +
  labs(title = "Cabezon SoCal SSB") +
  theme_bw()

STAR_SSB
```

```{r load cabezon data}
my.seed <- 666
set.seed(my.seed)

library(sdmTMB)

cabezon <- read.csv("manta cabezon data for Dan.csv")

str(cabezon)
```

```{r data structure checks}
# One observation per station per season?
cabezon %>%
  count(year, season, line.station) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# One observation per station per month?
cabezon %>%
  count(year, month, line.station) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# One observation per station per cruise?
cabezon %>%
  count(cruise, line.station) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# Stations sampled by year
cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(n_stations = n_distinct(line.station))
table(cabezon$line.station, cabezon$year)

# Sampling grid
ggplot(cabezon, aes(longitude, latitude)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3)

# Zero-inflation check
cabezon %>%
  mutate(zero = larvae_100m3 == 0) %>%
  count(zero)

plot(cabezon$volume_sampled, cabezon$larvae_100m3)
hist(cabezon$larvae_100m3)

# Composite station identifier
cabezon <- cabezon %>%
  mutate(station_id = paste(line, station, sep = "_"))
```

```{r annual summary}
annual_cab_summary <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_larvae = mean(larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_larvae   = sd(larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    n           = n(),
    se          = sd_larvae / sqrt(n)
  )

ggplot(annual_cab_summary, aes(x = year, y = mean_larvae)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_larvae - se, ymax = mean_larvae + se),
              alpha = 0.5, fill = "skyblue") +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    x        = "Year",
    y        = expression("Mean larvae per 100 m"^3),
    title    = "Annual Mean Larval Abundance",
    subtitle = expression("Ribbon shows " %+-% " 1 SE")
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r STAR comparison}
STAR_age0
STAR_SSB
STAR_recdevs

# ── Age-0 recruits vs. CalCOFI larval abundance ────────────────────────────────

STAR_age0_calcofi  <- left_join(x, annual_cab_summary, by = "year")
scale_factor_age0  <- max(STAR_age0_calcofi$value, na.rm = TRUE) /
                      max(STAR_age0_calcofi$mean_larvae, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(STAR_age0_calcofi, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = value), color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_larvae * scale_factor_age0), color = "coral") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name     = "Age-0 Recruits",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_age0,
                        name = expression("Mean Larvae per 100 m"^3))
  ) +
  labs(title = "SoCal Cabezon Age-0 Recruits and Larval Abundance Over Time") +
  theme_bw()

# ── Recruitment deviations vs. CalCOFI larval abundance ───────────────────────

STAR_recdevs_calcofi <- left_join(y, annual_cab_summary, by = "year")
scale_factor_devs    <- max(STAR_recdevs_calcofi$value, na.rm = TRUE) /
                        max(STAR_recdevs_calcofi$mean_larvae, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(STAR_recdevs_calcofi, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = value), color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_larvae * scale_factor_devs), color = "coral") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name     = "Recruitment Deviations",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor_devs,
                        name = expression("Mean Larvae per 100 m"^3))
  ) +
  labs(title = "SoCal Cabezon Recruitment Deviations and Larval Abundance Over Time") +
  theme_bw()

# ── Cross-correlation: CalCOFI observations vs. STAR outputs ──────────────────

# Recruitment deviations
obs_recdevs <- STAR_recdevs_calcofi %>%
  filter(year %in% annual_cab_summary$year & year %in% y$year)

ccf(obs_recdevs$mean_larvae, obs_recdevs$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main    = "CCF: Larvae vs. Recruitment Deviations (observed years only)")

# Age-0 recruits
obs_age0 <- STAR_age0_calcofi %>%
  filter(year %in% annual_cab_summary$year & year %in% x$year)

ccf(obs_age0$mean_larvae, obs_age0$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main    = "CCF: Larvae vs. Age-0 Recruits (observed years only)")
```

```{r spatial exploration}
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(maps)

cabezon_sf <- st_as_sf(
  cabezon,
  coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
  crs    = 4326
)

world <- ne_coastline(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

x_limits <- c(-122, -117)
y_limits <- c(31, 36)

ggplot(cabezon) +
  geom_point(aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, size = larvae_100m3, color = year),
             alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 10)) +
  borders("world", colour = "gray40") +
  coord_sf(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits, expand = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station",
    size  = expression("Larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# ── Labeled station map ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

station_locations <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(line.station) %>%
  summarise(
    latitude  = mean(latitude),
    longitude = mean(longitude),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

coast <- map_data("world", region = "USA")

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = coast, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "grey85", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(data = station_locations, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude),
             color = "#2a7bb5", size = 2) +
  geom_text(data = station_locations,
            aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, label = line.station),
            size = 2.5, hjust = -0.15, vjust = 0.4, color = "grey20") +
  coord_fixed(
    ratio = 1.3,
    xlim  = c(min(station_locations$longitude) - 1, max(station_locations$longitude) + 1),
    ylim  = c(min(station_locations$latitude)  - 1, max(station_locations$latitude)  + 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae Sampling Stations",
    subtitle = "CalCOFI survey stations; labels show line.station identifier",
    x        = "Longitude",
    y        = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10),
    panel.grid    = element_line(color = "grey92")
  )
```

```{r tow summaries}
# ── Positive tow proportions by year, month, season, and station ──────────────

pos_tows_year <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_month <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_season <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_station <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(station_id) %>%
  summarise(
    total_tows        = n(),
    positive_tows     = sum(larvae_100m3 > 0),
    pct_positive_tows = positive_tows / total_tows * 100
  )

pos_tows_year
pos_tows_month
pos_tows_season
pos_tows_station

# ── Average larvae count (all tows and positive tows only) ────────────────────

avg_larvae_year <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_month <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_season <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_station <- cabezon %>%
  group_by(station_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_all      = mean(larvae_100m3),
    mean_positive = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0])
  )

avg_larvae_year
avg_larvae_month
avg_larvae_season
avg_larvae_station

# ── Stacked bar: positive vs. total tows ──────────────────────────────────────

plot_data <- bind_rows(
  pos_tows_year   %>% transmute(group_var = "Year",   level = as.character(year),   positive_tows, negative_tows = total_tows - positive_tows),
  pos_tows_month  %>% transmute(group_var = "Month",  level = as.character(month),  positive_tows, negative_tows = total_tows - positive_tows),
  pos_tows_season %>% transmute(group_var = "Season", level = as.character(season), positive_tows, negative_tows = total_tows - positive_tows)
) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(positive_tows, negative_tows), names_to = "tow_type", values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(
    group_var = factor(group_var, levels = c("Year", "Month", "Season")),
    tow_type  = factor(tow_type, levels = c("negative_tows", "positive_tows"))
  )

plot_data_year <- plot_data %>% filter(group_var == "Year")
plot_data_ms   <- plot_data %>% filter(group_var %in% c("Month", "Season"))

shared_fill <- scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("negative_tows" = "grey80", "positive_tows" = "steelblue"),
  labels = c("negative_tows" = "Larvae Absent", "positive_tows" = "Larvae Present")
)

shared_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

p_year <- ggplot(plot_data_year, aes(x = level, y = count, fill = tow_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  shared_fill + shared_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Positive vs. Total Tows",
    subtitle = "Stacked bars show larvae-present (blue) against total sampling effort (grey)",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Number of Tows",
    fill     = NULL
  )

p_month_season <- ggplot(plot_data_ms, aes(x = level, y = count, fill = tow_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ group_var, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  shared_fill + shared_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Positive vs. Total Tows",
    subtitle = "Stacked bars show larvae-present (blue) against total sampling effort (grey)",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Number of Tows",
    fill     = NULL
  )

p_year
p_month_season

# ── Boxplots: log-larvae by year, month, and season (positive tows only) ──────

box_data <- bind_rows(
  cabezon %>% mutate(group_var = "Year",   level = as.character(year)),
  cabezon %>% mutate(group_var = "Month",  level = as.character(month)),
  cabezon %>% mutate(group_var = "Season", level = as.character(season))
) %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    log_larvae = log(larvae_100m3),
    group_var  = factor(group_var, levels = c("Year", "Month", "Season")),
    level = case_when(
      group_var == "Month"  ~ factor(level, levels = as.character(1:12)),
      group_var == "Season" ~ factor(level, levels = c("winter", "spring", "summer", "fall")),
      TRUE                  ~ factor(level)
    )
  )

box_data_year <- box_data %>% filter(group_var == "Year")
box_data_ms   <- box_data %>% filter(group_var %in% c("Month", "Season"))

shared_box_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

p_year_box <- ggplot(box_data_year, aes(x = level, y = log_larvae)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#2a7bb5", color = "grey30", alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 1) +
  shared_box_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Average Count by Year (Positive Tows Only)",
    subtitle = "Log-transformed larvae per 100m³; zero-catch tows excluded",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "log(Larvae per 100m³)"
  )

p_ms_box <- ggplot(box_data_ms, aes(x = level, y = log_larvae)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#2a7bb5", color = "grey30", alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ group_var, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  shared_box_theme +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larvae: Average Count by Month and Season (Positive Tows Only)",
    subtitle = "Log-transformed larvae per 100m³; zero-catch tows excluded",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "log(Larvae per 100m³)"
  )

p_year_box
p_ms_box
```

```{r station heatmaps}
# ── By year ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

heatmap_data_year <- cabezon %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  group_by(line.station, year) %>%
  summarise(mean_log_larvae = mean(log(larvae_100m3)), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(heatmap_data_year, aes(x = year, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Year",
    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
    x = NULL, y = "South \u2190 Station \u2192 North"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

# ── By month ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

heatmap_data_month <- cabezon %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  group_by(line.station, month) %>%
  summarise(mean_log_larvae = mean(log(larvae_100m3)), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(heatmap_data_month, aes(x = month, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Month",
    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
    x = NULL, y = "South \u2190 Station \u2192 North"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

# ── By season ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

heatmap_data_szn <- cabezon %>%
  filter(larvae_100m3 > 0) %>%
  group_by(line.station, season) %>%
  summarise(mean_log_larvae = mean(log(larvae_100m3)), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(heatmap_data_szn, aes(x = season, y = line.station, fill = mean_log_larvae)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "log(Larvae\nper 100m³)") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    title    = "Cabezon Larval Abundance by Station and Season",
    subtitle = "Positive tows only; white = no positive tows recorded",
    x = NULL, y = "South \u2190 Station \u2192 North"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )
```

```{r sdmTMB model fit, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cab_mesh <- make_mesh(
  cabezon,
  xy_cols = c("longitude", "latitude"),
  cutoff  = 0.15
)

plot(cab_mesh); title("SPDE Mesh for Cabezon CalCOFI analysis")

# ── Delta-Gamma models ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# fit1: spatial + spatiotemporal AR1 (both components)
cab_fit1 <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data           = cabezon,
  mesh           = cab_mesh,
  time           = "year",
  family         = delta_gamma(),
  spatial        = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("ar1", "ar1")
)
cab_fit1; sanity(cab_fit1)

# fit1a: spatial only
cab_fit1a <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data           = cabezon,
  mesh           = cab_mesh,
  time           = "year",
  family         = delta_gamma(),
  spatial        = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("off", "off")
)
cab_fit1a; sanity(cab_fit1a)

# fit1b: spatiotemporal AR1 on delta (binomial) component only
cab_fit1b <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data           = cabezon,
  mesh           = cab_mesh,
  time           = "year",
  family         = delta_gamma(),
  spatial        = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("ar1", "off")
)
cab_fit1b; sanity(cab_fit1b)

# fit1c: spatiotemporal AR1 on gamma (positive) component only
cab_fit1c <- sdmTMB(
  list(larvae_100m3 ~ 1, larvae_100m3 ~ 1),
  data           = cabezon,
  mesh           = cab_mesh,
  time           = "year",
  family         = delta_gamma(),
  spatial        = list("on", "on"),
  spatiotemporal = list("off", "ar1")
)
cab_fit1c; sanity(cab_fit1c)

# ── Tweedie models ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# fit2: spatial + spatiotemporal AR1
cab_fit2 <- sdmTMB(
  formula        = larvae_100m3 ~ 1,
  data           = cabezon,
  mesh           = cab_mesh,
  time           = "year",
  family         = tweedie(),
  spatial        = "on",
  spatiotemporal = "ar1"
)
cab_fit2; sanity(cab_fit2)

# fit2a: spatial only
cab_fit2a <- sdmTMB(
  formula        = larvae_100m3 ~ 1,
  data           = cabezon,
  mesh           = cab_mesh,
  time           = "year",
  family         = tweedie(),
  spatial        = "on",
  spatiotemporal = "off"
)
cab_fit2a; sanity(cab_fit2a)

# ── Model comparison ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

AIC(cab_fit1, cab_fit1a, cab_fit1b, cab_fit1c, cab_fit2, cab_fit2a)

cv_m1  <- sdmTMB_cv(cab_fit1$call$formula,  cabezon, cab_mesh, delta_gamma(), k_folds = 5)
cv_m1a <- sdmTMB_cv(cab_fit1a$call$formula, cabezon, cab_mesh, delta_gamma(), k_folds = 5)
cv_m1b <- sdmTMB_cv(cab_fit1b$call$formula, cabezon, cab_mesh, delta_gamma(), k_folds = 5)
cv_m1c <- sdmTMB_cv(cab_fit1c$call$formula, cabezon, cab_mesh, delta_gamma(), k_folds = 5)
cv_m2  <- sdmTMB_cv(cab_fit2$call$formula,  cabezon, cab_mesh, tweedie(),     k_folds = 5)
cv_m2a <- sdmTMB_cv(cab_fit2a$call$formula, cabezon, cab_mesh, tweedie(),     k_folds = 5)

cv_table <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "Delta-Gamma spatial + spatiotemporal AR1",
    "Delta-Gamma spatial",
    "Delta-Gamma spatiotemporal delta AR1",
    "Delta-Gamma spatiotemporal gamma AR1",
    "Tweedie spatial + spatiotemporal AR1",
    "Tweedie spatial"
  ),
  AIC = c(
    AIC(cab_fit1), AIC(cab_fit1a), AIC(cab_fit1b),
    AIC(cab_fit1c), AIC(cab_fit2), AIC(cab_fit2a)
  ),
  Cross_Validation = c(
    cv_m1$sum_loglik, cv_m1a$sum_loglik, cv_m1b$sum_loglik,
    cv_m1c$sum_loglik, cv_m2$sum_loglik, cv_m2a$sum_loglik
  )
)

cv_table$delta_AIC <- cv_table$AIC - min(cv_table$AIC)
cv_table$delta_CV  <- cv_table$Cross_Validation - min(cv_table$Cross_Validation)
cv_table <- cv_table[order(cv_table$Cross_Validation), ]
cv_table

tidy(cab_fit1, effects = "ran_pars")
tidy(cab_fit2, effects = "ran_pars")
```

```{r model diagnostics}
cab_mesh$mesh$loc[1:5, ]

pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  longitude = seq(x_limits[1], x_limits[2], by = 0.05),
  latitude  = seq(y_limits[1], y_limits[2], by = 0.05)
) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(year = as.integer(sort(unique(cabezon$year))))

# ── In-sample calibration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

pred_obs <- predict(cab_fit1, type = "response")

pred_obs %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean      = mean(larvae_100m3, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_mean     = mean(est, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_occ       = mean(larvae_100m3 > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_occ      = mean(est1, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs_pos_mean  = mean(larvae_100m3[larvae_100m3 > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    pred_pos_mean = mean(est2, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

pred_obs$presence <- pred_obs$larvae_100m3 > 0

pred_obs %>%
  mutate(prob_bin = cut(est1, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pred          = mean(est1),
    observed_presence  = mean(presence),
    n                  = n()
  )

# Predicted vs. observed (response scale)
plot(pred_obs$est, cabezon$larvae_100m3,
     xlab = "Predicted", ylab = "Observed")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Predicted vs. observed (log scale)
plot(log1p(pred_obs$est), log1p(cabezon$larvae_100m3),
     xlab = "log(Predicted + 1)", ylab = "log(Observed + 1)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Gamma component: positive tows only
pos_idx <- cabezon$larvae_100m3 > 0
plot(log(pred_obs$est2[pos_idx]), log(cabezon$larvae_100m3[pos_idx]),
     xlab = "log(Predicted positive abundance)",
     ylab = "log(Observed positive abundance)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Calibration plot: predicted presence probability vs. observed presence rate
calibration_plot <- pred_obs %>%
  mutate(prob_bin = cut(est1, breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(prob_bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred = mean(est1), observed = mean(presence))

plot(calibration_plot$mean_pred, calibration_plot$observed,
     xlab = "Predicted presence probability",
     ylab = "Observed presence frequency")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# ── Residual diagnostics ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

rq_res <- residuals(cab_fit1, type = "mle-mvn")

qqnorm(rq_res)
qqline(rq_res)

pred_obs$rq_resid <- rq_res
ggplot(pred_obs, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, color = rq_resid)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2() +
  facet_wrap(~ year)

# Temporal calibration: are predictions tracking temporal trends?
pred_obs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(obs = mean(larvae_100m3), pred = mean(est)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = obs), color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed")

# ── Standardized abundance index ──────────────────────────────────────────────

# Full spatial grid index (uncertainty is high in years with sparse CalCOFI coverage)
cab_map   <- predict(cab_fit1, newdata = pred_grid, return_tmb_object = TRUE)
cab_index <- get_index(cab_map, area = 0.05^2, bias_correct = TRUE)

ggplot(cab_index, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year")

# Observed-station index (restricted to sampled locations only)
pred_grid_obs <- cabezon %>%
  dplyr::select(longitude, latitude, year) %>%
  distinct()

cab_map_obs   <- predict(cab_fit1, newdata = pred_grid_obs, return_tmb_object = TRUE)
cab_index_obs <- get_index(cab_map_obs, area = 1, bias_correct = TRUE)

ggplot(cab_index_obs, aes(x = year, y = est)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(y = "Estimated abundance index", x = "Year")

# ── Cross-correlation: larval index vs. STAR outputs ──────────────────────────

combined <- cab_index_obs %>%
  dplyr::select(year, est) %>%
  rename(larvae_index = est) %>%
  left_join(z, by = "year") %>%
  left_join(y, by = "year") %>%
  left_join(x, by = "year")

combined_obs <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(larvae_index) | is.na(value))

ccf(cab_index_obs$est, STAR_age0_calcofi$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main    = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Age-0 Recruits")

ccf(cab_index_obs$est, STAR_recdevs_calcofi$value,
    lag.max = 10,
    main    = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Recruitment Deviations")

ccf(z$value, cab_index_obs$est,
    lag.max = 10,
    main    = "CCF: Restricted Larval Index vs. Spawning Stock Biomass")

# Detrended CCF: SSB and larval index share a declining trend; remove it first
larvae_detrended <- residuals(lm(larvae_index ~ year, data = combined_obs))
ssb_detrended    <- residuals(lm(value ~ year, data = combined_obs))

ccf(larvae_detrended, ssb_detrended, lag.max = 10,
    main = "CCF: Detrended Larval Index vs. SSB")
```

```{r model fit plots, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}

# ── In-sample predictions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Delta-Gamma: est1 = occurrence prob, est2 = positive catch rate, combined = est1 * est2
pred_dg <- predict(cab_fit1, type = "response")
pred_dg$est_combined <- pred_dg$est1 * pred_dg$est2

# Tweedie: est is the combined expected value in response scale
pred_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, type = "response")

obs_dg <- cabezon %>% mutate(predicted = pred_dg$est_combined, observed = larvae_100m3)
obs_tw <- cabezon %>% mutate(predicted = pred_tw$est,           observed = larvae_100m3)

# ── Grid predictions for spatial maps ─────────────────────────────────────────

cab_map$data$est_combined <- cab_map$data$est1 * cab_map$data$est2
cab_map_tw <- predict(cab_fit2, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response")

# ── Predicted vs. observed scatter plots ──────────────────────────────────────

scatter_dg <- ggplot(obs_dg, aes(x = predicted, y = observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Delta-Gamma: Predicted vs. Observed",
    x     = expression("Predicted larvae per 100 m"^3),
    y     = expression("Observed larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_bw()

scatter_tw <- ggplot(obs_tw, aes(x = predicted, y = observed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Tweedie: Predicted vs. Observed",
    x     = expression("Predicted larvae per 100 m"^3),
    y     = expression("Observed larvae per 100 m"^3)
  ) +
  theme_bw()

scatter_dg
scatter_tw

# ── Faceted spatial maps: predicted surface + observed points ─────────────────

plot_spatial_fit <- function(grid_preds, est_col, obs_data, model_name) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(
      data = grid_preds,
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = log1p(.data[[est_col]])),
      interpolate = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_sf(data = world, color = "gray30", fill = "gray85", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(
      data = obs_data,
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, size = log1p(larvae_100m3)),
      shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "black", stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.75
    ) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      name     = expression(log(1 + hat(y))),
      option   = "plasma",
      na.value = NA
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      name  = expression(log(1 + y)),
      range = c(0.3, 3.5)
    ) +
    coord_sf(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits, expand = FALSE) +
    facet_wrap(~ year) +
    labs(title = paste(model_name, "— Predicted Surface & Observed Points")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      strip.text        = element_text(size = 7),
      axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.title      = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
}

plot_spatial_fit(cab_map$data, "est_combined", cabezon, "Delta-Gamma")
plot_spatial_fit(cab_map_tw,   "est",          cabezon, "Tweedie")
```
